barRaise.topFinding: Last cycle's HIGH is closed: v0.58.15 shipped the world-rescale revert and HEAD now equals the decided 32x16 + ASSET_SCALE_MASTER 0.3 approach, with the GDD pill, project.godot, the CHANGELOG header, and the commit all lockstep at v0.58.24 and the live gate-page mirror matching the shipped build. What remains is a stack of unapplied carry-overs and one fresh slip of the same family: a clean, ready path-extends to class_name conversion (21 building files plus the .bp_baseline.json ratchet 25 to 6) sits uncommitted, the GDD changelog footer has drifted from a one-patch gap to an eleven-patch gap, docs/ASSETS.md is a full version-band stale re-queued unapplied for two cycles, and Rising.json still reports workTreeClean true against a 21-file dirty tree. None of it blocks M1; it is drift and process debt the audit loop keeps finding and not closing. The highest-leverage move is one clean release that commits the BP conversion (baseline plus source, atomically) and drains the two stale drift items so the carry-over count stops growing.

actions.title: Commit the path-extends to class_name conversion, the regenerated `.bp_baseline.json` (path_extends 25 to 6), and the adherence doc as one atomic release; never partial-commit the baseline ahead of the source.
`git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak` so the v0.57.8 ignore-rule claim becomes true (sixth consecutive review), and update the now-stale path-extends rationale comment in building.gd.
Re-run write-dashboard-status after the next release so Rising.json workTreeClean and lastReleaseMessage reflect reality, and wire the canonical-audit skill to populate the `audit` block.

Regenerate `docs/ASSETS.md` against the current 28-PNG tree (drop the dead `walls/` row, fix terrain/nature counts, rewrite the convention line, restamp). Re-queued as br-assets-manifest-regen-2026-06-17.
Drain the two re-queued drift items this cycle (GDD footer backfill, ASSETS regen) so the audit-to-fix loop closes instead of re-queuing a third time.
Backfill GDD footer entries v0.58.14 through v0.58.24 and add a release.ps1 guard refusing a pill bump with no matching footer entry. Queued as br-gdd-footer-v05814-v05824-2026-06-17.
